title: arenaria congesta var. lithophila
intro: Arenaria congesta var. lithophila, also known as Lithophila or Sea Campion, is a type of alpine plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arenaria congesta var. lithophila include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
